subject: Interview Invitation for Senior Product Designer Role
content: Dear Oluwaseun, We were impressed by your application and would like to invite you for an interview. The position involves working on our fintech products serving millions of users across Africa. Please let us know your availability for next week.

subject: Application Update - UX Researcher Position
content: Hello Oluwaseun, Thank you for applying to our UX Researcher position. Your background in user research and experience with African markets caught our attention. We're currently reviewing applications and will be in touch soon.

subject: Follow-up on Frontend Engineer Application
content: Hi Oluwaseun, I reviewed your application for the Frontend Engineer role. Your experience with payment systems and React is exactly what we're looking for. Would you be available for a technical discussion this Friday?

subject: Thank you for your interest
content: Dear Oluwaseun, Thank you for your interest in Flutterwave. While we don't have an immediate match for your current profile, we'd love to keep your resume on file for future opportunities in our growing Lagos office.

subject: Application for Senior Product Designer
content: Dear Hiring Team, I am excited to apply for the Senior Product Designer position at Access Bank PLC. With my 6+ years of experience in fintech UX design and deep understanding of African user behaviors, I am confident I can contribute significantly to your digital transformation initiatives.
